trivia: The first stretched ATR arrived in 1988 and set the template every 70-seat turboprop still follows. The remaining airframes are mostly night-shift freighters now.
A -200 hit almost always means cargo: check the callsign and enjoy a piece of 1980s engineering still earning.
funFacts: Many survivors fly for small package networks.
